description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.3 Docker image, set the variables JEKYLL_ENV=production and LC_ALL=C.UTF-8, and run bundle install as a before_script. Define two stages: test and deploy. Add a test job in the test stage that executes bundle exec jekyll build -d test, saves the test directory as an artifact, and runs on all branches except master. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs bundle exec jekyll build -d public, publishes the public directory as a pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
